name: menu-digital
description: Menu digital con panel de administracion

scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.test: npm --prefix backend run test && npm --prefix frontend run test
scripts.lint: npm --prefix backend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run lint
scripts.format: npm --prefix backend run format && npm --prefix frontend run format
scripts.format:check: npm --prefix backend run format:check && npm --prefix frontend run format:check
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run test
